title: Lead Instructional Designer at Quest Alliance

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Quest Alliance
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Instructional Designer in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!
